[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Custom Banners](https://www.banners.com/banners) 3. Championship Banners # Championship Banners ### Sports Championship & Victory Banners ![DPS Kraken Championship Banner](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/c593ac155e3544528a14aee37f88084d.png) * [Product Overview](#6b146a84-5dc2-41a6-ac0b-c74f3d1701e3) #### [Championship Banner Material](#championship-banner-materialCollapse) Championship Banners are most commmonly printed on high-quality 13oz scrim vinyl banner material or 18 oz Extra Heavy Duty Scrim Vinyl Material. But they are also available in our premium banner soft fabric material if you are looking for more of high end look and feel for indoor use only. The scrim vinyl is a woven fiber inside the material that gives the banner extra strength and the banner soft fabric is a low shine fire rated material. You can choose from these different material options: • 13 oz. Premium Matte • 13 oz. Premium Gloss • 18 oz. Extra Heavy Duty Matte • Fabric (NFPS-701 Certified Fire Rated Fabric Material) Championship banners are digitally-printed in full color. You can select to upload your own artwork or have one of our professional graphic designers assist you with your artwork. By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your banner. Pole pockets can either be 2", 3" or 4". We don't recommend having any text or images within 3 inches of the edge of the banner when you select pole pockets. 2" pole pocket - fits a 3/4" diameter pole. 3" pole pocket - fits a 1 1/4" diameter pole. 4" pole pocket - fits a 1 1/2" diameter pole #### [Championship Banner Cut Options](#championship-banner-cut-optionsCollapse) ### Championship Banners Cut Options To help accomodate your needs we offer three different championship banner cut options. Pennant Championship Banner Swallowtail Championship Banner Square Championship Banner ![Pennant Style Championship Banner | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/20-05-28-pennant-matte-full-riot.jpg) ![Swallowtail Championship Banner | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/20-05-28-swallowtail-glossy-full-riot.jpg) ![Square Cut Championship Banner | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/20-05-28-rectangle-championship-banner-riot.jpg) #### [Artwork](#artworkCollapse) #### [Artwork Guidelines](#artwork-guidelinesCollapse) Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps files — with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you. #### [Artwork/Order Proofs](#artworkorder-proofsCollapse) If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval. #### [Color Match Proof System](#color-match-proof-systemCollapse) If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative. #### [Production Times](#production-timesCollapse) ### Production Time Tables We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from.
